revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Template links short/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Template links short/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Template links short/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Template links short/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Template links short/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Template links short/doc]]</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} :''Main discussion & Queries: [[w:template talk:Lts|template talk:Lts]]'' {{tsh|Lts}} [[Template:Lts]] is a smaller variant of {{tlx|Lt}} with pleasant output, for use especially also on browsers which don't support ·. __NOTOC__ === Usage === {{Lts|template}} shows links for the specified template.
{{Lts}} shows links for a template wrt the {{PAGENAME}}. === Example === {| | '''Code''' || '''Result''' |- | {{Lts|Lt}} | {{Lts|Lt}} |- | {{Lts}} | {{Lts}} |}{{clear}} === See also === {| | {{lts|Las}} || 'Lts' formatted, but for anything,
 Defaults to article space, but accepts category or template, etc. namespace prefixes too. |- | {{Lts|Lts}} || for templates ''('''L'''ist '''T'''emplate '''S'''hort ["Lt"])'' |- | {{Lts|Lcs}} || for categories |- | {{Lts|Lps}} || for {{ns:Project}} (= {{ns:Project}}) |- | {{Lts|Ltsmeta}} || for templates copied from [[m:|Meta]] |- | {{Lts|Lts/}} || for template lists (see below) |- | {{Lts|Lx}} || boilerplate for the Lx family |- | [[:Category:Internal link templates]] || for a [[#Comparison|comparison]] of this zoo see below |- | colspan="2" | {{Ltsmeta|Lps}} |- | colspan="2" | {{Ltsmeta|Lts}} |- | colspan="2" | {{Ltsmeta|Ltsmeta}} |}{{clear}} === Comparison === We got a zoo of similar templates, pick what you like. This list is probably incomplete and intentionally omits variants with parameters like {{Tlx|Tlx}} and the various redirects. {| class="wikitable sortable collapsible" ! Source !! Code !! Result |- | {{Lts/|lt}} | {{tlx|lt|x4}} | {{lt|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|lts}} | {{tlx|lts|x4}} | {{lts|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|lts/}} | {{tlx|lts/|x4}} | {{lts/|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tetl}} | {{tlx|tetl|x4}} | {{tetl|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|ti}} | {{tlx|ti|x4}} | {{ti|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tic}} | {{tlx|tic|x4}} | {{tic|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tiw}} | {{tlx|tiw|x4}} | {{tiw|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tl}} | {{tlx|tl|x4}} | {{tl|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tn}} | {{tlx|tn|x4}} | {{tn|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tlc}} | {{tlx|tlc|x4}} | {{tlc|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tls}} | {{tlx|tls|x4}} | {{tls|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tlsetl}} | {{tlx|tlsetl|x4}} | {{tlsetl|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tlt}} | {{tlx|tlt|x4}} | {{tlt|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|ttl}} | {{tlx|ttl|x4}} | {{ttl|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|twlh}} | {{tlx|twlh|x4}} | {{twlh|x4}} |} {{tl-nav}} {{clear}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Pagelinks templates]] [[Category:Internal template-link templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} :''Main discussion & Queries: [[w:template talk:Lts|template talk:Lts]]'' {{tsh|Lts}} [[Template:Lts]] is a smaller variant of {{tlx|Lt}} with pleasant output, for use especially also on browsers which don't support ·. __NOTOC__ === Usage === {{Lts|template}} shows links for the specified template.
{{Lts}} shows links for a template wrt the {{PAGENAME}}. === Example === {| | '''Code''' || '''Result''' |- | {{Lts|Lt}} | {{Lts|Lt}} |- | {{Lts}} | {{Lts}} |}{{clear}} === See also === {| | {{lts|Las}} || 'Lts' formatted, but for anything,
 Defaults to article space, but accepts category or template, etc. namespace prefixes too. |- | {{Lts|Lts}} || for templates ''('''L'''ist '''T'''emplate '''S'''hort ["Lt"])'' |- | {{Lts|Lcs}} || for categories |- | {{Lts|Lps}} || for {{ns:Project}} (= {{ns:Project}}) |- | {{Lts|Ltsmeta}} || for templates copied from [[m:|Meta]] |- | {{Lts|Lts/}} || for template lists (see below) |- | {{Lts|Lx}} || boilerplate for the Lx family |- | [[:Category:Internal link templates]] || for a [[#Comparison|comparison]] of this zoo see below |- | colspan="2" | {{Ltsmeta|Lps}} |- | colspan="2" | {{Ltsmeta|Lts}} |- | colspan="2" | {{Ltsmeta|Ltsmeta}} |}{{clear}} === Comparison === We got a zoo of similar templates, pick what you like. This list is probably incomplete and intentionally omits variants with parameters like {{Tlx|Tlx}} and the various redirects. {| class="wikitable sortable collapsible" ! Source !! Code !! Result |- | {{Lts/|lt}} | {{tlx|lt|x4}} | {{lt|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|lts}} | {{tlx|lts|x4}} | {{lts|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|lts/}} | {{tlx|lts/|x4}} | {{lts/|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tetl}} | {{tlx|tetl|x4}} | {{tetl|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|ti}} | {{tlx|ti|x4}} | {{ti|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tic}} | {{tlx|tic|x4}} | {{tic|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tiw}} | {{tlx|tiw|x4}} | {{tiw|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tl}} | {{tlx|tl|x4}} | {{tl|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tn}} | {{tlx|tn|x4}} | {{tn|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tlc}} | {{tlx|tlc|x4}} | {{tlc|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tls}} | {{tlx|tls|x4}} | {{tls|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tlsetl}} | {{tlx|tlsetl|x4}} | {{tlsetl|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tlt}} | {{tlx|tlt|x4}} | {{tlt|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|ttl}} | {{tlx|ttl|x4}} | {{ttl|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|twlh}} | {{tlx|twlh|x4}} | {{twlh|x4}} |} {{tl-nav}} {{clear}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Pagelinks templates]] [[Category:Internal template-link templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} :''Main discussion & Queries: [[w:template talk:Lts|template talk:Lts]]'' {{tsh|Lts}} [[Template:Lts]] is a smaller variant of {{tlx|Lt}} with pleasant output, for use especially also on browsers which don't support ·. __NOTOC__ === Usage === {{Lts|template}} shows links for the specified template.
{{Lts}} shows links for a template wrt the {{PAGENAME}}. === Example === {| | '''Code''' || '''Result''' |- | {{Lts|Lt}} | {{Lts|Lt}} |- | {{Lts}} | {{Lts}} |}{{clear}} === See also === {| | {{lts|Las}} || 'Lts' formatted, but for anything,
 Defaults to article space, but accepts category or template, etc. namespace prefixes too. |- | {{Lts|Lts}} || for templates ''('''L'''ist '''T'''emplate '''S'''hort ["Lt"])'' |- | {{Lts|Lcs}} || for categories |- | {{Lts|Lps}} || for {{ns:Project}} (= {{ns:Project}}) |- | {{Lts|Ltsmeta}} || for templates copied from [[m:|Meta]] |- | {{Lts|Lts/}} || for template lists (see below) |- | {{Lts|Lx}} || boilerplate for the Lx family |- | [[:Category:Internal link templates]] || for a [[#Comparison|comparison]] of this zoo see below |- | colspan="2" | {{Ltsmeta|Lps}} |- | colspan="2" | {{Ltsmeta|Lts}} |- | colspan="2" | {{Ltsmeta|Ltsmeta}} |}{{clear}} === Comparison === We got a zoo of similar templates, pick what you like. This list is probably incomplete and intentionally omits variants with parameters like {{Tlx|Tlx}} and the various redirects. {| class="wikitable sortable collapsible" ! Source !! Code !! Result |- | {{Lts/|lt}} | {{tlx|lt|x4}} | {{lt|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|lts}} | {{tlx|lts|x4}} | {{lts|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|lts/}} | {{tlx|lts/|x4}} | {{lts/|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tetl}} | {{tlx|tetl|x4}} | {{tetl|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|ti}} | {{tlx|ti|x4}} | {{ti|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tic}} | {{tlx|tic|x4}} | {{tic|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tiw}} | {{tlx|tiw|x4}} | {{tiw|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tl}} | {{tlx|tl|x4}} | {{tl|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tn}} | {{tlx|tn|x4}} | {{tn|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tlc}} | {{tlx|tlc|x4}} | {{tlc|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tls}} | {{tlx|tls|x4}} | {{tls|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tlsetl}} | {{tlx|tlsetl|x4}} | {{tlsetl|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tlt}} | {{tlx|tlt|x4}} | {{tlt|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|ttl}} | {{tlx|ttl|x4}} | {{ttl|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|twlh}} | {{tlx|twlh|x4}} | {{twlh|x4}} |} {{tl-nav}} {{clear}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Pagelinks templates]] [[Category:Internal template-link templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} :''Main discussion & Queries: [[w:template talk:Lts|template talk:Lts]]'' {{tsh|Lts}} [[Template:Lts]] is a smaller variant of {{tlx|Lt}} with pleasant output, for use especially also on browsers which don't support ·. __NOTOC__ === Usage === {{Lts|template}} shows links for the specified template.
{{Lts}} shows links for a template wrt the {{PAGENAME}}. === Example === {| | '''Code''' || '''Result''' |- | {{Lts|Lt}} | {{Lts|Lt}} |- | {{Lts}} | {{Lts}} |}{{clear}} === See also === {| | {{lts|Las}} || 'Lts' formatted, but for anything,
 Defaults to article space, but accepts category or template, etc. namespace prefixes too. |- | {{Lts|Lts}} || for templates ''('''L'''ist '''T'''emplate '''S'''hort ["Lt"])'' |- | {{Lts|Lcs}} || for categories |- | {{Lts|Lps}} || for {{ns:Project}} (= {{ns:Project}}) |- | {{Lts|Ltsmeta}} || for templates copied from [[m:|Meta]] |- | {{Lts|Lts/}} || for template lists (see below) |- | {{Lts|Lx}} || boilerplate for the Lx family |- | [[:Category:Internal link templates]] || for a [[#Comparison|comparison]] of this zoo see below |- | colspan="2" | {{Ltsmeta|Lps}} |- | colspan="2" | {{Ltsmeta|Lts}} |- | colspan="2" | {{Ltsmeta|Ltsmeta}} |}{{clear}} === Comparison === We got a zoo of similar templates, pick what you like. This list is probably incomplete and intentionally omits variants with parameters like {{Tlx|Tlx}} and the various redirects. {| class="wikitable sortable collapsible" ! Source !! Code !! Result |- | {{Lts/|lt}} | {{tlx|lt|x4}} | {{lt|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|lts}} | {{tlx|lts|x4}} | {{lts|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|lts/}} | {{tlx|lts/|x4}} | {{lts/|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tetl}} | {{tlx|tetl|x4}} | {{tetl|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|ti}} | {{tlx|ti|x4}} | {{ti|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tic}} | {{tlx|tic|x4}} | {{tic|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tiw}} | {{tlx|tiw|x4}} | {{tiw|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tl}} | {{tlx|tl|x4}} | {{tl|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tn}} | {{tlx|tn|x4}} | {{tn|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tlc}} | {{tlx|tlc|x4}} | {{tlc|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tls}} | {{tlx|tls|x4}} | {{tls|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tlsetl}} | {{tlx|tlsetl|x4}} | {{tlsetl|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tlt}} | {{tlx|tlt|x4}} | {{tlt|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|ttl}} | {{tlx|ttl|x4}} | {{ttl|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|twlh}} | {{tlx|twlh|x4}} | {{twlh|x4}} |} {{tl-nav}} {{clear}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Pagelinks templates]] [[Category:Internal template-link templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23626449376|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} :''Main discussion & Queries: [[w:template talk:Lts|template talk:Lts]]'' {{tsh|Lts}} [[Template:Lts]] is a smaller variant of {{tlx|Lt}} with pleasant output, for use especially also on browsers which don't support ·. __NOTOC__ === Usage === {{Lts|template}} shows links for the specified template.
{{Lts}} shows links for a template wrt the {{PAGENAME}}. === Example === {| | '''Code''' || '''Result''' |- | {{Lts|Lt}} | {{Lts|Lt}} |- | {{Lts}} | {{Lts}} |}{{clear}} === See also === {| | {{lts|Las}} || 'Lts' formatted, but for anything,
 Defaults to article space, but accepts category or template, etc. namespace prefixes too. |- | {{Lts|Lts}} || for templates ''('''L'''ist '''T'''emplate '''S'''hort ["Lt"])'' |- | {{Lts|Lcs}} || for categories |- | {{Lts|Lps}} || for {{ns:Project}} (= {{ns:Project}}) |- | {{Lts|Ltsmeta}} || for templates copied from [[m:|Meta]] |- | {{Lts|Lts/}} || for template lists (see below) |- | {{Lts|Lx}} || boilerplate for the Lx family |- | [[:Category:Internal link templates]] || for a [[#Comparison|comparison]] of this zoo see below |- | colspan="2" | {{Ltsmeta|Lps}} |- | colspan="2" | {{Ltsmeta|Lts}} |- | colspan="2" | {{Ltsmeta|Ltsmeta}} |}{{clear}} === Comparison === We got a zoo of similar templates, pick what you like. This list is probably incomplete and intentionally omits variants with parameters like {{Tlx|Tlx}} and the various redirects. {| class="wikitable sortable collapsible" ! Source !! Code !! Result |- | {{Lts/|lt}} | {{tlx|lt|x4}} | {{lt|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|lts}} | {{tlx|lts|x4}} | {{lts|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|lts/}} | {{tlx|lts/|x4}} | {{lts/|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tetl}} | {{tlx|tetl|x4}} | {{tetl|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|ti}} | {{tlx|ti|x4}} | {{ti|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tic}} | {{tlx|tic|x4}} | {{tic|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tiw}} | {{tlx|tiw|x4}} | {{tiw|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tl}} | {{tlx|tl|x4}} | {{tl|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tn}} | {{tlx|tn|x4}} | {{tn|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tlc}} | {{tlx|tlc|x4}} | {{tlc|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tls}} | {{tlx|tls|x4}} | {{tls|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tlsetl}} | {{tlx|tlsetl|x4}} | {{tlsetl|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tlt}} | {{tlx|tlt|x4}} | {{tlt|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|ttl}} | {{tlx|ttl|x4}} | {{ttl|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|twlh}} | {{tlx|twlh|x4}} | {{twlh|x4}} |} {{tl-nav}} {{clear}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Pagelinks templates]] [[Category:Internal template-link templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} :''Main discussion & Queries: [[w:template talk:Lts|template talk:Lts]]'' {{tsh|Lts}} [[Template:Lts]] is a smaller variant of {{tlx|Lt}} with pleasant output, for use especially also on browsers which don't support ·. __NOTOC__ === Usage === {{Lts|template}} shows links for the specified template.
{{Lts}} shows links for a template wrt the {{PAGENAME}}. === Example === {| | '''Code''' || '''Result''' |- | {{Lts|Lt}} | {{Lts|Lt}} |- | {{Lts}} | {{Lts}} |}{{clear}} === See also === {| | {{lts|Las}} || 'Lts' formatted, but for anything,
 Defaults to article space, but accepts category or template, etc. namespace prefixes too. |- | {{Lts|Lts}} || for templates ''('''L'''ist '''T'''emplate '''S'''hort ["Lt"])'' |- | {{Lts|Lcs}} || for categories |- | {{Lts|Lps}} || for {{ns:Project}} (= {{ns:Project}}) |- | {{Lts|Ltsmeta}} || for templates copied from [[m:|Meta]] |- | {{Lts|Lts/}} || for template lists (see below) |- | {{Lts|Lx}} || boilerplate for the Lx family |- | [[:Category:Internal link templates]] || for a [[#Comparison|comparison]] of this zoo see below |- | colspan="2" | {{Ltsmeta|Lps}} |- | colspan="2" | {{Ltsmeta|Lts}} |- | colspan="2" | {{Ltsmeta|Ltsmeta}} |}{{clear}} === Comparison === We got a zoo of similar templates, pick what you like. This list is probably incomplete and intentionally omits variants with parameters like {{Tlx|Tlx}} and the various redirects. {| class="wikitable sortable collapsible" ! Source !! Code !! Result |- | {{Lts/|lt}} | {{tlx|lt|x4}} | {{lt|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|lts}} | {{tlx|lts|x4}} | {{lts|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|lts/}} | {{tlx|lts/|x4}} | {{lts/|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tetl}} | {{tlx|tetl|x4}} | {{tetl|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|ti}} | {{tlx|ti|x4}} | {{ti|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tic}} | {{tlx|tic|x4}} | {{tic|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tiw}} | {{tlx|tiw|x4}} | {{tiw|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tl}} | {{tlx|tl|x4}} | {{tl|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tn}} | {{tlx|tn|x4}} | {{tn|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tlc}} | {{tlx|tlc|x4}} | {{tlc|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tls}} | {{tlx|tls|x4}} | {{tls|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tlsetl}} | {{tlx|tlsetl|x4}} | {{tlsetl|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|tlt}} | {{tlx|tlt|x4}} | {{tlt|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|ttl}} | {{tlx|ttl|x4}} | {{ttl|x4}} |- | {{Lts/|twlh}} | {{tlx|twlh|x4}} | {{twlh|x4}} |} {{tl-nav}} {{clear}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Pagelinks templates]] [[Category:Internal template-link templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
